display.purpose: Landing page hero headline. The line that must make the user hungry. One per page.

headline.purpose: Section titles within a page. Maximum one per scroll viewport.

title.purpose: Card headings, modal titles, sticky header product names.

body.purpose: All running prose, descriptions, notes. Cap at 65ch on desktop.

label.purpose: Section header stamps, badge text, meta labels. UPPERCASE only.

price.purpose: ALL monetary values, quantities, and order codes. Sora 700 exclusively.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Modal sheets, food detail overlays, floating panels.

shadows.name: shadow-soft
shadows.purpose: Menu item cards at rest. Warm mid-shadow.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Sticky headers, small interactive elements. Barely-there depth.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, badge state, icon swap. Immediate feedback.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Panel slide-in, card expand, overlay fade. Standard transition.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all exits and hover states.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Bounced entrance only — success icon, qty stepper increment pop.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action per screen. Đặt ngay, Thêm vào giỏ, Xác nhận.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; background: #D83A2E; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; border-radius: 999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #B52E23; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #E8DDCC; color: #5A3928; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #D83A2E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary choice. Go back, View full menu.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; background: transparent; color: #D83A2E; border: 1.5px solid #D83A2E; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(216,58,46,0.06); } .ds-btn-outline:active { background: rgba(216,58,46,0.12); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #D83A2E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Menu Item Card
components.description: The signature component. Carries food photo, name, price, and add-to-cart action.
components.html:
BÁN CHẠY

Cơm Tấm Sườn

65.000đ
components.css: .ds-menu-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(90,57,40,0.10); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-menu-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(37,33,27,0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-menu-card__img-wrap { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F7E8C9 0%, #E8DDCC 100%); } .ds-menu-card__img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 420ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-menu-card:hover .ds-menu-card__img { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-menu-card__body { padding: 16px; } .ds-menu-card__name { font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #25211B; margin: 6px 0 8px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-menu-card__price { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #25211B; }

components.name: Bestseller Badge
components.description: Appears on menu items with high order volume.
components.css: .ds-badge-bestseller { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; background: #F4A51C; color: #25211B; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 999px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Popular Badge
components.description: Signals trending items. Appears alongside or independently of Bestseller.
components.css: .ds-badge-popular { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; background: rgba(216,58,46,0.12); color: #D83A2E; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 999px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Qty Stepper
components.description: Quantity control for cart items. Pill-shaped, paper background, chili buttons.
components.html: 2
components.css: .ds-qty-stepper { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #F7E8C9; border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; } .ds-qty-stepper__btn { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-qty-stepper__btn:hover { background: #E8DDCC; } .ds-qty-stepper__val { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; min-width: 24px; text-align: center; color: #25211B; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input. Table number, customer notes, delivery address.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Ghi chú cho bếp..." />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1.5px solid #E8DDCC; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #25211B; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #D83A2E; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #E8DDCC; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #F7E8C9; color: #5A3928; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Cart Footer Bar
components.description: Sticky bottom bar showing cart count and checkout CTA. Appears on landing and menu pages.
components.html: 3 món195.000đ
components.css: .ds-cart-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(255,248,234,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-top: 1px solid #E8DDCC; } .ds-cart-bar__info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-cart-bar__count { font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #5A3928; } .ds-cart-bar__total { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #25211B; } .ds-cart-bar__cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 22px; background: #D83A2E; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Be Vietnam Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-cart-bar__cta:hover { background: #B52E23; }

narrative.overview:
Bếp Nhà Mình là thiết kế như quầy thu ngân của một quán ăn quen — nơi chủ quán nhớ tên bạn, khói bếp thoảng nhẹ, và mọi thứ đều ở đúng chỗ. Hệ thống visual truyền đạt sự ấm áp qua các màu đất (rice cream, paper, soy brown), di chuyển với sự tự tin của bếp bận rộn, và tạo dựng niềm tin qua phân cấp rõ ràng và hành vi dễ đoán. Không trick user; không lãng phí thời gian.

Landing page là surface quan trọng nhất. Nó phải làm user thèm ăn — theo đúng nghĩa đen — ngay trong lần cuộn đầu tiên. Food photography, accent hổ phách ấm, khoảng trắng rộng rãi, và một CTA duy nhất không thể bỏ lỡ. Mọi màn hình sau đó duy trì cùng một nhiệt độ ấm, không bao giờ có sự chuyển đổi đột ngột sang trắng lạnh hay xanh dương công ty.

Đây là hệ thống brand-register cho customer-facing surface. Mật độ thấp; breathing room rộng rãi. Typography ấm và dễ đọc. Motion phản hồi nhanh — feedback tức thì, choreography hiếm và có chủ đích.
keyCharacteristics: Earthen, warm palette anchored in cream and deep brown, with chili-red as the singular action color
Mobile-first: all layouts designed at 375px, enhanced above 768px
Two typefaces only: Be Vietnam Pro (warmth) + Sora (prices, numbers)
Pill-shaped interactive elements (999px radius) — warmth, not sharpness
Motion exits fast (120ms ease-out); entrances slightly slower (220ms); no bounce except success states
Light mode only for customer-facing surface

rules.name: The One Fire Rule
rules.body: Chili red is the only action color. Do not introduce a second saturated hue for interactive elements on the customer-facing surface.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral must lean warm. Never tint toward blue-gray. Rice cream and paper are not interchangeable with #f5f5f5.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: The system uses exactly two typefaces: Be Vietnam Pro and Sora. Adding a third pollutes the warmth signal.

rules.name: The Price Registry Rule
rules.body: Every number representing money or quantity uses Sora 700. Never Be Vietnam Pro for prices.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: No shadow uses a blue or neutral base. All rgba() values use charcoal (37,33,27) or soy (90,57,40). A blue-tinted shadow breaks the atmosphere.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards and surfaces have no shadow by default. Shadows appear on hover (clickable cards) and on elements that persistently float (sticky header, fixed cart bar).

dos: Do use Chili red (#D83A2E) exclusively for the primary action per screen
Do use Sora for all prices, order totals, and quantities
Do apply pill-shape (999px) to all buttons, chips, qty steppers, and tracking code pills
Do use warm-tinted shadows (rgba(37,33,27,...)) for all elevation
Do keep cards on white (#FFFFFF) against rice-cream page (#FFF8EA)
Do keep the landing page hero focused on a single CTA
Do support prefers-reduced-motion — disable keyframe animations, reduce transitions to 50ms
Do ensure all touch targets are minimum 44×44px
donts: Don't use purple gradients, neon accents, gradient text (background-clip: text), or decorative glassmorphism
Don't use the fast-food chain aesthetic — no red-and-yellow, no promo-banner-first layout
Don't use SaaS dashboard aesthetics on the customer surface
Don't use modal as the first thought for any interaction
Don't use gray shadows (rgba(0,0,0,...)) — all shadows use warm-charcoal or warm-soy
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent)
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated indefinitely
Don't use #000000 or #FFFFFF as base text colors
